title: GMS Week 4 - EYE OF THE TIGER!
section_path: GMS Week 4 - EYE OF THE TIGER!
section_path_text: GMS Week 4 - EYE OF THE TIGER!
summary:
Main
Following a somewhat slower start to the year, vessel prices seem to be bouncing back in both Pakistan and Bangladesh this week. Steel plate prices have improved overall (especially in India) and the lack of tonnage continues to frustrate Recyclers. As such, any available tonnage is seeing intense competition at and above market pricing from hungry end Buyers.
